allow: Bash(node -e "delete process.env.USE_SUPABASE; const c = require\('./config'\); console.log\('default:', c.USE_SUPABASE\);")
Bash(node -e "process.env.USE_SUPABASE='false'; const c = require\('./config'\); console.log\('explicit false:', c.USE_SUPABASE\);")
Bash(node -e "process.env.USE_SUPABASE='true'; const c = require\('./config'\); console.log\('explicit true:', c.USE_SUPABASE\);")
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'POST /api/login wrong: %{http_code} \(401 기대\)\\n' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"password":"wrong"}' http://localhost:3001/api/login)

Bash(node -e "const s = require\('./src/instagramScraper'\); console.log\('ok:', Object.keys\(s\)\); console.log\('parse1:', s.parseAbbreviatedNumber\('1.2K'\)\); console.log\('parse2:', s.parseAbbreviatedNumber\('1.5만'\)\); console.log\('parse3:', s.parseAbbreviatedNumber\('1,234'\)\); console.log\('user1:', s.parseUsername\('https://www.instagram.com/cristiano/'\)\); console.log\('user2:', s.parseUsername\('cristiano'\)\); console.log\('user3:', s.parseUsername\('https://www.instagram.com/cristiano/reels/'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\('./src/instagramScraper'\); console.log\('user1:', s.parseUsername\('https://www.instagram.com/cristiano/'\)\); console.log\('user2:', s.parseUsername\('cristiano'\)\); console.log\('user3:', s.parseUsername\('@cristiano'\)\); console.log\('user4:', s.parseUsername\('https://www.instagram.com/cristiano/reels/'\)\); console.log\('user5:', s.parseUsername\('reels'\)\); console.log\('user6:', s.parseUsername\(''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='test'; const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); try { require\('./server.js'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); } setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('server loaded ok, exiting'\); process.exit\(0\); }, 1500\);")
